title: cyperus auratus
intro: Cyperus auratus, also known as Yellow Nutgrass, is a type of perennial plant in the sedge family that is native to Asia and Australia. Its medicinal properties include being used to treat digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, as well as being used as a diuretic. The health benefits of Cyperus auratus include its ability to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and improve digestion, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Cyperus auratus can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support overall health and wellness.
